conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank You - Reflecting on a Successful Internship

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

As my internship program at [Company/Lab Name] has successfully concluded, I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for the opportunity to work under your guidance. This experience has been incredibly valuable, and I feel I have learned an immense amount over the past [Number] weeks/months.

The knowledge and insights you shared, both through your direct mentorship and by introducing me to the environment at [Company/Lab Name], have been instrumental to my professional growth. I truly appreciate the time you dedicated to helping me navigate [mention a specific project or area, e.g., the data analysis phase or the research workflow].

Overall, the internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks. More importantly than the technical skills, I am grateful for the opportunity to see theoretical concepts applied to real-world challenges—a perspective that truly brings academic learning to life.

Thank you again for believing in my potential and for providing such a rich and supportive learning environment. I hope to stay in touch and will certainly be keeping you updated on my future academic and professional endeavors.

With sincere appreciation,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Current Program]<turn|>
